title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SRM University Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SRM University Holdings Services:
SRM University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
